How It Works

A simple four-step process that transforms raw listing data into actionable market intelligence.

1

Search

Search thousands of listings with advanced filters. Find exactly what you're looking for.

2

Track

We continuously monitor prices, tracking every change and sale in real-time.

3

Analyze

Compare prices, view depreciation curves, and understand true market value.

4

Save

Set alerts and never miss a deal. Get notified the moment prices drop.

Search → Compare → Save

Our intuitive workflow makes it easy to find the perfect car at the right price. Search thousands of listings, compare prices with historical data, and save your favorites.

Advanced search filters
Verified sold prices
Price trend analysis
Smart price alerts
Others

Delete sold prices. Historical data vanishes. Buyers are left guessing what cars actually sold for.

AutoHarvester

Preserve every price. Archive sold data forever. See the complete price history no one else has.

Powerful Tools

Everything You Need to Win

Professional-grade tools that give you the edge in negotiations. Know more than the seller.

Simple Pricing

Choose the plan that fits your needs. Start free, upgrade when you're ready.

Free

Perfect for occasional buyers

$0forever
  • Basic search
  • Limited price history (30 days)
  • View 5 sold prices/month
  • Email support
Most Popular

Pro

For serious buyers and sellers

$29/month
  • Advanced search filters
  • Full price history
  • Unlimited sold prices
  • Price drop alerts
  • Monthly market reports
  • Priority support

Dealer

For dealerships and professionals

$299/month
  • Everything in Pro
  • API access
  • Bulk data exports
  • Advanced analytics
  • White-label reports
  • Dedicated account manager
No credit card required
Cancel anytime
14-day free trial
24/7 support
Real Success Stories

Loved by Smart Buyers

Join thousands of Australians who never overpay for cars again.

$4,200 saved

2022 BMW 330i

Verified Purchase
"AutoHarvester saved me $4,200 on my BMW. I saw the price history, knew it had been sitting for months, and negotiated accordingly. The dealer was shocked I knew so much."

The Story: Found a BMW that had been listed for 180 days with 3 price drops. Used the data to negotiate from $58k down to $53,800.

Michael Chen

Car Enthusiast

Sydney, NSW
